commit_scope: Add a recurring guard for BML/BMF-specific host-native surfaces so new language semantics cannot enter sibling kernels silently.

local_validation.notes: The inventory guard reports exactly bml_scan_file and bmf_apply_rule_native in Go, Rust, and TypeScript. worktree_pr_guard now runs the inventory as bml-bmf-native-boundary-guard before commit evidence validation.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: New BML/BMF host-native surfaces are blocked by local preflight unless the boundary inventory is updated deliberately.

phase_gate.reason: The native boundary is locally machine-guarded. CI, merge, deploy, and public verification are still pending for this branch.

evidence_refs: scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py inventories registered bml_/bmf_ natives in Go, Rust, and TypeScript kernels.
scripts/worktree_pr_guard.py runs bml-bmf-native-boundary-guard as part of local preflight.
docs/system_audit/bml_bmf_architecture_review_20260601.md defines the reviewed kernel boundary and migration path.
